insights: Rejections dominated by wrong_market_price (9/20, 45%) — overpriced listings are primary blocker across all players.
Facsimile/printed signatures appear in 2 rejections (10%); genuine autos in confirmations show distinct product lines (Topps Tribute, Authentic Images).
Multi-card lots, incomplete sets, and 'pick your own' formats rejected 4 times (20%) — single authentic cards only.
Investment-grade language ('RARE', 'SSP', 'INVESTMENT CARD') appears 5 times in rejections; confirmations use neutral product/year descriptors.
Confirmation cards delta >81% below market (Ichiro autos priced $16–17 vs $90 avg) — real snipes show dramatic underpricing, rejections show inflated pricing.
Non-sports gold editions (Merrick Mint, 23kt gold) flagged as 'other' — specialty/novelty variants rejected regardless of authenticity.
Title/card mismatch (wrong_parallel, wrong_player) in 3 rejections (15%) — data integrity failures indicate low-effort relists.
Confirmed snipes feature vintage/recent mainstream releases (2001 Authentic Images, 2023 Topps Tribute); rejections skew toward low-volume parallels and reprints.
